store_headline: Grunge WordPress Theme for Barbershops and Tattoo Studios
store_subheadline: Build a bold brand site with portfolio galleries, WooCommerce, and a dark grunge aesthetic.
features: Dark vintage design with grunge typography and bold aesthetics
Built with WPBakery Page Builder ($99 value) included
Wolf Visual Composer extension with lifestyle-focused elements
Portfolio post type for showcasing work and services
Photo Album galleries for visual storytelling
WooCommerce integration with wishlist for product sales
Multiple homepage templates for different business types
Content Blocks system for custom headers and footers
One-click demo import with complete content
Mobile-optimized responsive design for all devices
selling_points: Serves barbershops, tattoo studios, and biker brands from one authentic grunge identity
Tattooed-man and vintage-brickwork hero that signals subculture credibility before a single word is read
Gold and cream typography on dark backgrounds — the specific vintage-grunge aesthetic of ink, leather, and whiskey
Portfolio galleries designed for showcasing service work: cuts, ink, and builds — not just product photos
Multiple homepage templates for barbershop, tattoo studio, and biker brand without rebuilding from scratch
WooCommerce integration for merch, products, and branded goods with wishlist functionality
WPBakery-powered with Slider Revolution for full-screen hero customization
Built for businesses that want a brand identity — not just a portfolio or booking page
key_benefits: Build a dark vintage brand site that makes your trade look credible
Showcase cuts, ink, and builds with portfolio galleries built for service work
Attract clients in the ink, hair, and biker subculture they recognize
Sell merchandise through WooCommerce without abandoning the grunge aesthetic of your brand
Launch barbershop, tattoo studio, or biker brand sites from a single theme
Convert curious visitors into clients with a site authentic to your trade
Stand apart from polished agency themes with attitude, texture, and subcultural authenticity
design_features: Dark grunge color palettes and textures
Fullscreen hero sliders with dramatic imagery
Photo album galleries with multiple display options
Sticky header with transparent and dark variants
use_cases: Motorcycle Club and Biker Culture Sites
Vintage and Alternative Lifestyle Brand Showcases

testimonials.text: Great design, easy to customize. I really liked it, a large selection of different variations and possible page designs. super fast)
testimonials.author: Handubei

testimonials.text: I use Hares for 3 different website and it never fail to fit my needs thanks to its versatility
testimonials.author: LucasSBH

testimonials.text: First of all, the themes are absolutely stunning, modern and high quality. Most importantly though, the customer support is great - any question gets answered very quickly and you get help.
testimonials.author: Tinnok
